description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a before_script which echoes "Downloading GLua Lexer", downloads glualint.zip from the GitHub release using curl, echoes "Unzipping GLua Lexer", and unzips the archive. Add a test job named "test" in the test stage that runs a script echoing "Running GLua Lexer" and then executes ./glualint magic_carpets/lua. No custom Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are specified, so the pipeline uses the default runner environment.
